meaning: adj.显著的,现象的,能知觉的
examples: It is predicted that this phenomenal growth will have a great impact on our society and economy.
The product has been a phenomenal success.
Exports of Australian wine are growing at a phenomenal rate.
It will have been a phenomenal ride that is not likely to be repeated next year.
It is a phenomenal opportunity for us to go over there and get very aggressive.
